calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that no new papers have been filed and that Counsel has not asked for additional time. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Steven Strain to appear on November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the issue of his efforts to locate other Heris and address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition to Terminate Trust is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Petitioner.

Mr. Strain stated that he needs to re-notice the amended petition, that the Trustors came from China and that the Husband has no living relatives. The Court stated that it finds it hard to believe that there aren't any other relatives. The Petition to Terminate Trust was continued to October 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further efforts to locate heirs.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
